meaning: adj.正派的,端庄的,有分寸的,(服装)得体的,大方的adj.<口>相当好的、象样的
examples: He did the decent thing and resigned.
There are no decent schools round here.
The majority of people around here are decent people.
What Rovio is not doing (that most gamemakers do) is building a stable of decent games.
Choosing the size of your policy means having a decent idea of what your company is worth.
